name: Tahoe Brunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter bread with softened butter; set aside.
2. In a 10-12 inch skillet, melt 1/2 cup butter and slowly brown mushrooms and onions until tender. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.
3. Cook sausage and cut into bite-sized pieces.
4. In a greased 11 x 7 shallow casserole dish, layer half bread, then the mushroom mixture, sausage, and cheese. Repeat ending with cheese.
5. In a medium bowl, mix eggs, milk, mustard, nutmeg, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
6. Pour egg mixture over the casserole. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
7. Sprinkle parsley over the casserole before baking.
8. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until bubbly.
